sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80263" key="*pedosei/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Πεδο-σείων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n80263.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">earth-shaker</tr_>, coined as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ποσειδῶν</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
